name: Vegetable Tortellini Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, cook onion and garlic in olive oil until tender, about 6 minutes.
2. Add broth, tomatoes, Picante sauce and basil; bring to a boil.
3. Stir in tortellini; simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in bell pepper; continue to simmer for 3 to 4 minutes or until tortellini is tender.
5. Ladle into soup bowls; sprinkle with cheese.
Note: Very good with Reser's salsa.
Recipe serves 3.
